name: xi-io-inbox
description: Static-first xi-io Inbox preview shell using framework-derived UI patterns.

scripts.check:files: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['public/index.html','public/inbox-preview.css','public/inbox-preview.js','public/data/inbox-events.preview.json']; for (const f of files) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('missing '+f); process.exit(1); } } console.log('xi-io Inbox static preview files present');"
scripts.check:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('public/data/inbox-events.preview.json','utf8')); console.log('xi-io Inbox preview JSON valid');"
scripts.check: npm run check:files && npm run check:json && npm run check:js && npm run check:acc && npm run check:gmail
